## Verification

- [ ] `uv run ruff check src tests`
- [ ] `uv run pytest -q`
- [ ] `uv build`
- [ ] `uvx twine check --strict dist/*`
- [ ] `npm pack --dry-run`

## Data Safety

- [ ] I checked the diff for credentials, personal archive paths, private source
      data, and generated private graph artifacts.
